name: gcpscheduleprocessing
description: Scheduled GCP batch jobs (Cloud Run Jobs + Cloud Scheduler). First job: match-library export reading from GCP databases (Firestore + Cloud SQL) and writing CSV/ZIP files to a GCS bucket.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check jobs/registry.js && node --check jobs/match_library_gcs_export.js && node --check stdLib/env.js && node --check stdLib/secret_manager_resources.js && node --check stdLib/aurora_resources.js && node --check stdLib/retailscape_resources.js && node --check stdLib/firestore_resources.js && node --check stdLib/gcs_resources.js && node --check stdLib/node_utils.js && node --check stdLib/sendSlackNotification.js
